[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)

- Description: Blog images: unique SVG headers for Do Nothing Society and Plug-and-Play posts
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/49
  
  Details:
  Created unique SVG header images for two new blog posts, replacing reused cover images.
  
  ## What changed
  - `assets/blog/plug-and-play-architecture-funnel.svg` — clean funnel diagram showing the DAO's architecture: DApp/Telegram/CLI/GAS → Edgar → Google Sheet → ecosystem services (truesight.me, agroverse.shop, email agent, Daily Oracle, + future services)
  - `assets/blog/do-nothing-society-human-and-machine.svg` — warm abstract composition with organic forms (human/soul/relationships) on the left and subtle geometric grid (machine precision) on the right, centered on the post's thesis
  - Updated both post HTML files and `blog/index.html` card images to reference the new unique SVGs
  
  ## Design notes
  - Both SVGs use the DAO's earthen palette (saffron, cacao browns, muted teals)
  - Architecture diagram includes layer labels (L1 signed events, L2 sheet caches)
  - Do Nothing Society illustration avoids generic stock imagery; uses abstract evocative shapes
  
  ## GitHub
